name: StarAmount
description: Describes an amount of Telegram Stars.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Integer amount of Telegram Stars, rounded to 0; can be negative

fields.name: nanostar_amount
fields.description: The number of 1/1000000000 shares of Telegram Stars; from -999999999 to 999999999; can be negative if and only if amount is non-positive
